name: chrX_Xp22_2_AP1S2_SD
description: Xp22.2 SD cluster around AP1S2/GRPR/CTPS2; harbors ~20 kb directly oriented SD pairs at >97% identity that mediate rare Xp22.2 microdeletions associated with intellectual disability (Fried syndrome).

architecture.internal_structure: Short direct SD pairs ~15-25 kb flanking AP1S2; intronic AP1S2 SDs.
